async fn strand_names_returns_all_names() {\n        let runner = StrandRunner::new(vec![\n            Box::new(StubStrand::no_work(\"alpha\")),\n            Box::new(StubStrand::no_work(\"beta\")),\n        ]);\n        assert_eq!(runner.strand_names(), vec![\"alpha\", \"beta\"]);\n    }\n\n    /// A strand that always returns WorkCreated (never consumed).\n    struct AlwaysWorkCreated;\n\n    #[async_trait::async_trait]\n    impl Strand for AlwaysWorkCreated {\n        fn name(&self) -> &str {\n            \"always-creates\"\n        }\n        async fn evaluate(&self, _store: &dyn Box::new(StubStrand::beads(\"finder\", vec![bead])),\n        ]);\n        let store = EmptyStore;\n        let outcome = runner.select(&store, &HashSet::new()).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(\n       // AlwaysWorkCreated triggers restarts every pass.\n        // After MAX_RESTARTS (3), the waterfall should return None.\n        let runner = StrandRunner::new(vec![Box::new(AlwaysWorkCreated)]);\n        let store = EmptyStore;\n        let exclusions = HashSet::new();\n        let outcome = runner.select(&store, &exclusions).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(outcome.bead.is_none());\n        assert_eq!(outcome.waterfall_restarts, 4); // 3 restarts + 1 cap-exceeded\n        assert_eq!(\n            outcome.restart_triggers,\n            vec![\n                \"always-creates\",\n                \"always-creates\",\n                \"always-creates\",\n                \"always-creates\"\n            ]\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// Strand that increments an external counter each time it is evaluated.\n    struct CountingStrand {\n        name: &'static str,\n        count: std::sync::Arc<std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32>,\n        returns_work_created: bool,\n    }\n\n    impl CountingStrand {\n        fn no_work(\n            name: &'static str,\n            count: std::sync::Arc<std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32>,\n        ) -> Self {\n            CountingStrand {\n                name,\n                count,\n                returns_work_created: false,\n            }\n        }\n\n        fn work_created(\n            name: &'static str,\n            count: std::sync::Arc<std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32>,\n        ) -> Self {\n            CountingStrand {\n                name,\n                count,\n                returns_work_created: true,\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[async_trait::async_trait]\n    impl Strand for CountingStrand {\n        fn name(&self) -> &str {\n            self.name\n        }\n\n        async fn evaluate(&self, _store: &dyn BeadStore) -> StrandResult {\n            self.count.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n            if self.returns_work_created {\n                StrandResult::WorkCreated\n            } else {\n                StrandResult::NoWork\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn restart_cap_still_evaluates_remaining_strands() {\n        // When a strand repeatedly returns WorkCreated, the waterfall restarts.\n        // After MAX_RESTARTS, the remaining strands should still be evaluated\n        // so that operators see telemetry for every strand in the cycle.\n        let creator_count = std::sync::Arc::new(std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32::new(0));\n        let observer_a_count = std::sync::Arc::new(std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32::new(0));\n        let observer_b_count = std::sync::Arc::new(std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32::new(0));\n\n        let runner = StrandRunner::new(vec![\n            Box::new(CountingStrand::work_created(\n                \"creator\",\n                creator_count.clone(),\n            )),\n            Box::new(CountingStrand::no_work(\n                \"observer-a\",\n                observer_a_count.clone(),\n            )),\n            Box::new(CountingStrand::no_work(\n                \"observer-b\",\n                observer_b_count.clone(),\n            )),\n        ]);\n        let store = EmptyStore;\n        let exclusions = HashSet::new();\n        let outcome = runner.select(&store, &exclusions).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(outcome.bead.is_none());\n\n        // creator should have been evaluated MAX_RESTARTS + 1 = 4 times.\n        assert_eq!(creator_count.load(std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst), 4);\n\n        // After the restart cap, the remaining strands should each be evaluated\n        // at least once (the final pass through the waterfall).\n        let a = observer_a_count.load(std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n        let b = observer_b_count.load(std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n        assert!(\n            a >= 1,\n            \"observer_a should be evaluated at least once, got {a}\"\n        );\n        assert!(\n            b >= 1,\n            \"observer_b should be evaluated at least once, got {b}\"\n        );\n\n        // All 4 WorkCreated events are captured in restart_triggers.\n        assert_eq!(outcome.waterfall_restarts, 4);\n        assert_eq!(outcome.restart_triggers.len(), 4);\n        assert!(outcome.restart_triggers.iter().all(|t| t == \"creator\"));\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn empty_bead_found_continues_to_next() {\n        let bead = make_test_bead(\"real-bead\");\n        let runner = StrandRunner::new(vec![\n            Box::new(StubStrand::beads(\"empty-finder\", vec![])),\n            Box::new(StubStrand::beads(\"real-finder\", vec![bead])),\n        ]);\n        let store = EmptyStore;\n        let exclusions = HashSet::new();\n        let outcome =   #[tokio::test]\n    async fn multiple_beads_returns_first() {\n        let bead1 = make_test_bead(\"first\");\n        let bead2 = make_test_bead(\"second\");\n        let runner = StrandRunner::new(vec![Box::new(StubStrand::beads(\n            \"multi\",\n            vec![bead1, bead2],\n        ))]);\n        let store = EmptyStore;\n        let exclusions = HashSet::new();\n Bead Selection Logic\\n\\n**Configuration Structure (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/config/mod.rs`):**\\n```rust\\npub struct PluckConfig {\\n    pub exclude_labels: Vec<String>,\\n    pub split_after_failures: u32,  // default: 3\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Discovery Process (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs` lines 104-270):**\\n\\n1. **Query bead store** for ready, unassigned beads\\n2. **Label filtering:** Removes beads with excluded labels (double-filtered for safety)\\n3. **Status filtering:** Removes `in_progress` beads and `Open` beads with stale assignees\\n4. **Deterministic sorting:** Orders by priority, creation date, and ID\\n5. **Split trigger:** Checks if bead has excessive failures and returns Split instruction\\n\\n**Key Code Snippet:**\\n```rust\\nlet filters = Filters {\\n    assignee: None,\\n    exclude_labels: self.exclude_labels.clone(),\\n};\\nlet mut candidates = store.ready(&filters).await?;\\n```\\n\\n### 3. Configuration Reading\\n\\n**Config Loading (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/config/mod.rs`):**\\n- Global config: `~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\\n- Workspace overrides: `.needle.yaml` in workspace root\\n- Pluck-specific config under `strands.pluck` section\\n\\n**Default Configuration:**\\n```yaml\\nstrands:\\n  pluck:\\n    exclude_labels: []\\n    split_after_failures: 3\\n```\\n\\n### 4. Recent Changes Affecting Bead Discovery\\n\\n**Recent Commits (past month):**\\n\\n1. **`5002562` - \\\"feat(pluck): add comprehensive debug logging\\\"**\\n   - Added detailed tracing throughout the Pluck filtering pipeline\\n   - Logs evaluation start, bead store queries, label filtering decisions\\n   - Enables runtime debugging via `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug`\\n\\n2. **`6afe520` - \\\"fix(bead_store): accept bf's 'completed' bead status\\\"**\\n   - Fixed critical bug where \\\"completed\\\" status beads broke strand evaluation\\n   - Added per-record error isolation instead of failing entire list operations\\n   - Prevented cascade failures across Weave/Mend/Unravel/Knot strands\\n\\n### 5. Integration Points\\n\\n**Strand Waterfall (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/mod.rs`):**\\n- Waterfall order: Pluck → Mend → Explore → Weave → Unravel → Pulse → Reflect → Splice → Knot\\n- Exclusion filtering prevents re-selecting race-lost beads\\n- Telemetry records queue depth per priority level\\n\\n**Worker Integration (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/worker/mod.rs`):**\\n- `do_select()` method attempts atomic `claim_auto()` first\\n- Falls back to strand waterfall if auto-claim fails\\n- Handles workspace switching for cross-workspace beads\\n\\n**Bead Store Discovery (`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/bead_store/mod.rs`):**\\n- `BfCliBeadStore::discover()` locates the `bf` CLI\\n- `ready()` method queries beads with Filters struct\\n- Supports both assignee filtering and label exclusion\\n\\n## Key Files Summary\\n\\n1. **`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`** - Core Pluck strand implementation\\n2. **`/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/mod.rs`** - Strand runner and {"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"msg_20260709124510e4538f607a284e39","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"glm-4.7","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"call_b02c412b9cfb4278a2544686","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/coding/ARMOR/notes/bf-5p3g.md","content":"# Pluck Debug Flags and Logging Configuration\n\n## Overview\n\nPluck is the primary bead selection strand in NEEDLE, handling >90% of all bead processing. It uses Rust's `tracing` framework for comprehensive debug logging that can be enabled at runtime via environment variables.\n\n## Primary Debug Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n\nThe `RUST_LOG` environment variable controls logging verbosity and scope. It uses the format:\n```\nRUST_LOG=module_path=level\n```\n\n### Available Log Levels\n\n- `error` - Critical failures only\n- `warn` - Warning messages\n- `info` - General informational messages (default)\n- `debug` - Detailed execution flow\n- `trace` - Maximum verbosity, every operation\n\n## Pluck-Specific Debug Targets\n\n### Core Pluck Module\n\n**Target:** `needle::strand::pluck`\n\n**Levels:**\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` - Filtering decisions and candidate counts\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace` - Detailed execution flow\n\n### Related Module Targets\n\n- `needle::strand` - All strand operations (Pluck, Mend, Explore, etc.)\n- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store queries and operations\n- `needle::worker` - Worker coordination logic\n- `needle::dispatch` - Work dispatch operations\n\n## Recommended Debug Configurations\n\n### 1. Minimal Pluck Debug (Filtering Focus)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Quick debugging of filtering decisions without excessive output\n\n### 2. Comprehensive Pluck Trace\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Use case:** Deep dive into Pluck execution flow\n\n### 3. Full Strand Context\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Use case:** Understanding Pluck within the broader strand waterfall\n\n### 4. Complete Worker Context (RECOMMENDED)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Full visibility into bead selection, claiming, and dispatch\n\n### 5. Maximum Debug Output (Not Recommended)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Last resort for elusive bugs; produces massive output\n\n## What Gets Logged at Each Level\n\n### DEBUG Level (`needle::strand::pluck=debug`)\n\n- Evaluation start with configuration parameters\n- Bead store query filters\n- Candidate counts after each filtering stage\n- Label filtering exclusions with per-bead details\n- Status/assignee filtering results\n- Sorting operations with first candidate details\n- Split trigger checks with decision logic\n- Final candidate list returned for processing\n\n**Example output:**\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Bead store returned 42 candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads remaining=39\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Excluded bead due to labels bead_id=\"bf-123\" labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"]\n```\n\n### TRACE Level (`needle::strand::pluck=trace`)\n\nEverything from DEBUG plus:\n- Detailed execution flow between filtering stages\n- Individual bead examination during filtering\n- Split trigger evaluation details\n- Granular sorting operation details\n\n## Filtering Decision Logging\n\nPluck logs three specific filtering operations that determine which beads are claimable:\n\n### 1. Label Filtering\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Label filtering excluded {count} beads remaining={after_count}\n```\nLogs each excluded bead with:\n- `bead_id` - The excluded bead's ID\n- `labels` - All labels on the bead\n- `excluded_reasons` - Which labels triggered exclusion\n\n### 2. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Status/assignee filtering removed {count} beads remaining={after_count}\n```\nRemoves beads that are:\n- In `InProgress` status (claimed by another worker)\n- `Open` status but have a stale assignee\n\n### 3. Split Trigger Check\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Checking split trigger for first candidate bead_id={id} failure_count={count} threshold={threshold} split_triggered={bool}\n```\n\n## Configuration Files\n\n### Workspace-Level Override\nCreate `.needle.yaml` in your workspace root:\n```yaml\nstrands:\n  pluck:\n    exclude_labels: []          # Empty = use defaults [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n    split_after_failures: 3     # Auto-split beads after N consecutive failures\n```\n\n### Global Configuration\n`~/.config/needle/config.yaml` - Workspace configs override these settings\n\n## Usage Examples\n\n### Direct NEEDLE Execution\n```bash\n# Enable Pluck debug logging\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n\n# Full worker context\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n```\n\n### Using the ARMOR Capture Script\n```bash\n# The ARMOR workspace includes a pre-configured capture script\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug.log 1\n```\n\nThis script:\n1. Sets comprehensive debug logging\n2. Runs NEEDLE with the specified workspace\n3. Captures all output to a timestamped log file\n4. Provides grep commands for analyzing specific aspects\n\n## Log Analysis Commands\n\nAfter capturing debug output, analyze it with:\n\n```bash\n# Filter for Pluck-specific messages\ngrep -i 'pluck' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find filtering decisions\ngrep -i 'filter' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find excluded beads\ngrep -i 'exclude' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find candidate counts\ngrep -i 'candidate' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find split triggers\ngrep -i 'split' pluck-debug.log\n```\n\n## Key Implementation Details\n\n### Default Exclude Labels\nWhen `exclude_labels` is empty (default), Pluck uses:\n```rust\nconst DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_LABELS: &[&str] = &[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"];\n```\n\n### Deterministic Sorting\nCandidates are sorted by:\n```rust\n// (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\ncandidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n    a.priority.cmp(&b.priority)\n        .then_with(|| a.created_at.cmp(&b.created_at))\n        .then_with(|| a.id.as_ref().cmp(b.id.as_ref()))\n});\n```\n\n### Split Trigger Logic\n```rust\nif failure_count >= self.split_after_failures {\n    return StrandResult::Split(Box::new(first_candidate.clone()), failure_count);\n}\n```\n\n## Related Files\n\n- **Core Implementation:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs` (917 lines)\n- **Strand Waterfall:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/mod.rs` (901 lines)\n- **Configuration:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/config/mod.rs`\n- **Bead Store:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/bead_store/mod.rs`\n- **ARMOR Workspace Config:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/.env.pluck-debug`\n- **ARMOR Capture Script:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n\n## Recent Enhancements\n\n### Commit `5002562` (2026-07-09)\n\"feat(pluck): add comprehensive debug logging\"\n\nAdded 115 lines of detailed tracing events throughout the Pluck filtering pipeline:\n- Evaluation start with configuration\n- Bead store query results\n- Label filtering decisions with per-bead details\n- Status/assignee filtering results\n- Sorting operation details\n- Split trigger check with decision\n- Final result with candidate list\n\nThis enhancement {"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"msg_20260709124537194439c2f1234cb0","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"glm-4.7","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"call_a0f020540e064232ab2e306d","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"mkdir -p /home/coding/ARMOR/notes && cat > /home/coding/ARMOR/notes/bf-5p3g.md << 'EOF'\n# Pluck Debug Flags and Logging Configuration\n\n## Overview\n\nPluck is the primary bead selection strand in NEEDLE, handling >90% of all bead processing. It uses Rust's `tracing` framework for comprehensive debug logging that can be enabled at runtime via environment variables.\n\n## Primary Debug Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n\nThe `RUST_LOG` environment variable controls logging verbosity and scope. It uses the format:\n```\nRUST_LOG=module_path=level\n```\n\n### Available Log Levels\n\n- `error` - Critical failures only\n- `warn` - Warning messages\n- `info` - General informational messages (default)\n- `debug` - Detailed execution flow\n- `trace` - Maximum verbosity, every operation\n\n## Pluck-Specific Debug Targets\n\n### Core Pluck Module\n\n**Target:** `needle::strand::pluck`\n\n**Levels:**\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` - Filtering decisions and candidate counts\n- `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace` - Detailed execution flow\n\n### Related Module Targets\n\n- `needle::strand` - All strand operations (Pluck, Mend, Explore, etc.)\n- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store queries and operations\n- `needle::worker` - Worker coordination logic\n- `needle::dispatch` - Work dispatch operations\n\n## Recommended Debug Configurations\n\n### 1. Minimal Pluck Debug (Filtering Focus)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Quick debugging of filtering decisions without excessive output\n\n### 2. Comprehensive Pluck Trace\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Use case:** Deep dive into Pluck execution flow\n\n### 3. Full Strand Context\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Use case:** Understanding Pluck within the broader strand waterfall\n\n### 4. Complete Worker Context (RECOMMENDED)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Full visibility into bead selection, claiming, and dispatch\n\n### 5. Maximum Debug Output (Not Recommended)\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=debug\n```\n**Use case:** Last resort for elusive bugs; produces massive output\n\n## What Gets Logged at Each Level\n\n### DEBUG Level (`needle::strand::pluck=debug`)\n\n- Evaluation start with configuration parameters\n- Bead store query filters\n- Candidate counts after each filtering stage\n- Label filtering exclusions with per-bead details\n- Status/assignee filtering results\n- Sorting operations with first candidate details\n- Split trigger checks with decision logic\n- Final candidate list returned for processing\n\n**Example output:**\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Bead store returned 42 candidates\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Label filtering excluded 3 beads remaining=39\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Excluded bead due to labels bead_id=\"bf-123\" labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"]\n```\n\n### TRACE Level (`needle::strand::pluck=trace`)\n\nEverything from DEBUG plus:\n- Detailed execution flow between filtering stages\n- Individual bead examination during filtering\n- Split trigger evaluation details\n- Granular sorting operation details\n\n## Filtering Decision Logging\n\nPluck logs three specific filtering operations that determine which beads are claimable:\n\n### 1. Label Filtering\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Label filtering excluded {count} beads remaining={after_count}\n```\nLogs each excluded bead with:\n- `bead_id` - The excluded bead's ID\n- `labels` - All labels on the bead\n- `excluded_reasons` - Which labels triggered exclusion\n\n### 2. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Status/assignee filtering removed {count} beads remaining={after_count}\n```\nRemoves beads that are:\n- In `InProgress` status (claimed by another worker)\n- `Open` status but have a stale assignee\n\n### 3. Split Trigger Check\n```\nDEBUG strand.pluck: Checking split trigger for first candidate bead_id={id} failure_count={count} threshold={threshold} split_triggered={bool}\n```\n\n## Configuration Files\n\n### Workspace-Level Override\nCreate `.needle.yaml` in your workspace root:\n```yaml\nstrands:\n  pluck:\n    exclude_labels: []          # Empty = use defaults [\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n    split_after_failures: 3     # Auto-split beads after N consecutive failures\n```\n\n### Global Configuration\n`~/.config/needle/config.yaml` - Workspace configs override these settings\n\n## Usage Examples\n\n### Direct NEEDLE Execution\n```bash\n# Enable Pluck debug logging\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n\n# Full worker context\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n```\n\n### Using the ARMOR Capture Script\n```bash\n# The ARMOR workspace includes a pre-configured capture script\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug.log 1\n```\n\nThis script:\n1. Sets comprehensive debug logging\n2. Runs NEEDLE with the specified workspace\n3. Captures all output to a timestamped log file\n4. Provides grep commands for analyzing specific aspects\n\n## Log Analysis Commands\n\nAfter capturing debug output, analyze it with:\n\n```bash\n# Filter for Pluck-specific messages\ngrep -i 'pluck' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find filtering decisions\ngrep -i 'filter' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find excluded beads\ngrep -i 'exclude' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find candidate counts\ngrep -i 'candidate' pluck-debug.log\n\n# Find split triggers\ngrep -i 'split' pluck-debug.log\n```\n\n## Key Implementation Details\n\n### Default Exclude Labels\nWhen `exclude_labels` is empty (default), Pluck uses:\n```rust\nconst DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_LABELS: &[&str] = &[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"];\n```\n\n### Deterministic Sorting\nCandidates are sorted by:\n```rust\n// (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\ncandidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n    a.priority.cmp(&b.priority)\n        .then_with(|| a.created_at.cmp(&b.created_at))\n        .then_with(|| a.id.as_ref().cmp(b.id.as_ref()))\n});\n```\n\n### Split Trigger Logic\n```rust\nif failure_count >= self.split_after_failures {\n    return StrandResult::Split(Box::new(first_candidate.clone()), failure_count);\n}\n```\n\n## Related Files\n\n- **Core Implementation:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs` (917 lines)\n- **Strand Waterfall:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/mod.rs` (901
